items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for batch processing for statements.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the specific feature 'Batch processing for statements', which is not addressed in any of the prior steps or linked use cases. The linked use case mentions various needs for physical mail generation but does not provide evidence of the existence or functionality of batch processing for statements. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence provided regarding this requirement.
